text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text:
Turn this corner… and it's that building over there. 
—…Oh my? …Trainer!
choice_data_list: <size=30>Pisa! What a coincidence. Are you heading somewhere?</size>
<size=30>Pisa! What a coincidence. Are you heading somewhere?</size>

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text:
Yes, to the art museum. Hehe… 
They're holding a limited-time jewelry exhibition right now.

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text: I hear they have various types of turquoise from all over the world on display… I've been looking forward to it for so long♪
Even among gemstones, she particularly loved turquoise. Listening to her talk so happily about it sparked my interest as well.

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text:
Oh my… I'd love that! Hehe… 
I'm glad you've taken an interest in gemstones too, Trainer♪

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text:
(You always stay so close by my side. In that case… 
I have to make today a wonderful day.)

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text:
A brilliance that will remain in your heart… 
Let's go find it together♪

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text:
Oh my…! Look at this, Trainer! 
The cut on this diamond is absolutely magnificent…!

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text: Ah, it's truly beautiful… Besides, this little one… seems to have been cherished by its owner for a very long time.

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text: I've always watched my parents work up close, so… I just get a feeling. Hehe… surprisingly, many gemstones are quite talkative.

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text: This place is overflowing with so many feelings too. I love chatting with them… so I can't help but enjoy myself♪
And so, I enjoyed the jewelry exhibition alongside Victoire Pisa, who was walking with a bounce in her step, until—
In front of one particular showcase, her expression clouded over.

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text: —…This gemstone… It has such a very, very… sad color…
A turquoise earring was displayed where she was looking. However—
choice_data_list: <size=38>It's an earring, but there's only one…?</size>

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text: …According to the caption, the other one… 『Was lost during inheritance and its whereabouts remain unknown』…

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text: Only the right earring…

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text:
The space next to it… has been left empty. 
As if it's waiting for the other half…

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps… it holds the owner's wish… 
"That they may meet again"…
Just then, I noticed an old lady standing next to Victoire Pisa. She too was staring intently at the earring, as if she had forgotten the passage of time.

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text: —…Could it be…

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text: Umm… Excuse me. Do you happen to… recognize this earring?

text_block_list.name: Old Lady
text_block_list.text: Eh…? What are you talking about…?

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text: I apologize for being so sudden. It's just that from your gaze, I felt a deep affection… as well as a small sense of hope.

text_block_list.name: Old Lady
text_block_list.text: You surprised me… Yes… I felt like I saw something very similar to this piece of jewelry… when I was a child.

text_block_list.name: Old Lady
text_block_list.text:
But… it must be my imagination. 
I'm sorry for bringing up such a strange story…

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text:
Not at all, it's very intriguing. If you don't mind… 
could you tell me a little more?

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text: Even the smallest detail… might serve as a crucial clue for these earrings to find their way back to each other once again.

text_block_list.name: Old Lady
text_block_list.text: Why… Would you go that far…?

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text:
Because from this gemstone—… 
I can feel a profound loneliness.

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text: Or perhaps… the sorrow of those wishing for a reunion… and their hopes.

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text:
If it's possible to connect them… 
I want to connect them once more.

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text: Connecting a pair of earrings meant to be together, and connecting their happiness—…

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text: Please… won't you lend us your strength?
choice_data_list: <size=38>She is the daughter of a jeweler</size>

text_block_list.text: She knows and cherishes encounters and connections with people, gemstones, and many other things… She genuinely wishes to save everyone suffering from loneliness.
She is prepared to give her all… to connect an irreplaceable bond. —I conveyed my feelings as best I could, asking her to please believe in her.

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text: Trainer…

text_block_list.name: Old Lady
text_block_list.text: …What a curious pair you two are. Actually… I feel like I heard a story from my mother long ago… about inheriting some gemstones.

text_block_list.name: Old Lady
text_block_list.text:
—…If it exists anywhere, it would be at my family home. 
I'll make the arrangements, so please come and look for it.

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text: It doesn't seem to be… in any of the jewelry boxes you gathered.

text_block_list.name: Old Lady
text_block_list.text:
I supposed so. There's no way it would be found so easily. 
But where else could we possibly look…?

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text: —…For instance… how about looking in a place connected to your mother?

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text: Since it's only one half… but something so valuable… it might have been quietly… and carefully put away somewhere.

text_block_list.name: Old Lady
text_block_list.text: An old dresser… There's a large, antique dresser in the room my mother used to use as her own. I'll show you the way.

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text:
What a magnificent dresser… 
Could it possibly be… inside here? —……Ah…!

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text: It seems there's a lot of emotional attachment to this jewelry box… It's old, but there are signs that it's been restored many times…

text_block_list.name: Old Lady
text_block_list.text: Could it really be… inside?
The lady gently opened the lid. And then—

text_block_list.name: Old Lady
text_block_list.text:
This is it…! 
I can't believe we actually found it…!

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text:
Ah… Thank goodness. 
Now they can be connected once more.
To verify it, we returned to the jewelry exhibition with the earring we had found.

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text: …Yes, they're exactly the same. They might not be able to be displayed next to each other right away… but surely, someday—
Victoire Pisa broke into a smile full of affection. It was an angel's smile, rejoicing and celebrating their reunion.
choice_data_list: <size=38>I'm so glad… It's all thanks to you</size>
<size=38>I'm so glad… It's all thanks to you</size>

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text: Trainer…

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text:
Hehe… Your smile… 
It's so… so dazzling…
choice_data_list: <size=32>That's because I'm happy. That they finally connected!</size>
<size=32>That's because I'm happy. That they finally connected!</size>

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text:
(You care as if it were your own joy… 
You're… Sharing your heart with me.)

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text: (…—It's welling up. It's coming across so much that it's overflowing…)

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text:
Ah… I can certainly feel it. 
Your joy… Your happiness.
